sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56715" key="keramoth/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερᾰμοτήξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (τήκω</foreign>) <sense id="n56715.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">potter</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
